name: Apple Crisp
recipeIngredient: Granny Smith apples, cored, peeled and sliced thin
3/4 cup rolled or quick cooking oats
recipeInstructions:
Place apples in a large casserole dish. Drizzle lemon juice over.
Combine remaining ingredients for filling and toss with apples until thoroughly coated.
Combine topping ingredients and sprinkle over apples.
Bake in a preheated 350 degree oven for about 45 minutes, or until center is bubbly.
